evidence_honesty_rules: Missing evidence must be named as missing.
Warn/unknown rows cannot be accepted without direct repair evidence.
Stale Command Center references are context only, not direct evidence.
json_only_strategy: Ask for one JSON object, then extract first safe object if thinking text precedes it.
repair_strategy: Feed scorer reasons back and require corrected JSON only.
stale_reference_rules: Do not cite stale Command Center rows as direct evidence.
system_instruction: You are a local Qwen model producing private/internal CapCard JSON for Monogate. Return one JSON object only; if evidence is missing, say missing evidence, never invent acceptance.
unknown_solver_handling_rules: Do not mark unknown as solved.
warn_row_repair_rules: Preserve blocker until validator PASS and human review note exist.
